meta.title: Power On Interio | Commercial and Residential Interiors
meta.description: Power On Interio designs commercial offices, homes, kitchens, wardrobes, and turnkey interiors with practical planning and refined execution.

aboutSection.title: A practical interior design partner for commercial spaces, homes, and utility areas.
aboutSection.description: We align layout, materials, and site execution so each space feels polished and works smoothly every day.

commercialSection.title: Commercial interiors that work hard and look polished.
commercialSection.description: Reception areas, workstations, and meeting rooms planned for easier movement and a sharper brand presence.

servicesSection.title: Design, consultation, and turnkey execution tailored to each space.

clientsSection.title: Trusted by interior, construction, and workspace-led teams.
clientsSection.description: Chosen by teams that value clear planning and dependable delivery.

whySection.title: Clear planning, steady communication, and reliable delivery.

faqSection.title: Clear answers before the project begins.

contactCtaSection.title: Ready to discuss your space?
contactCtaSection.description: Share the site, scope, and timeline, and we’ll help you define the next step.
